evals.prompt: Get me all the info on this video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jNQXAC9IVRw
evals.expected_output: Structured metadata block with title, channel, upload date, duration, views, likes, description, tags, and URL for 'Me at the zoo' video

evals.prompt: List the 5 most recent videos from https://www.youtube.com/@TED
evals.expected_output: A markdown table with 5 rows showing recent TED videos with columns for title, date, duration, views, and URL

evals.prompt: Get basic info about this YouTube video using only the oEmbed endpoint (no yt-dlp): https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ
evals.expected_output: Basic metadata from oEmbed showing title, author name, thumbnail URL — explicitly using WebFetch to the oEmbed API
